title: vittadinia cervicularis
intro: Vittadinia cervicularis, also known as New South Wales blue daisy or swamp daisy, is a flowering plant native to eastern Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Vittadinia cervicularis include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine.
